svg.aria-label: V1 orientation columns — pinwheel topology, a hex grid of oriented strokes whose angles vary smoothly around five pinwheel singularities
svg.text: Each stroke = one column’s preferred orientation. Smooth across cortex; singular at the marked centers.
Deterministic SVG — multi-pinwheel orientation field over a hex grid. Topology after Bonhoeffer & Grinvald, Nature 1991.
